must_detect.matched_text:
We process personal data and MNPI under the PDPA and CMSA for disclosure obligations to a Malaysian securities exchange (Bursa Kencana) and for internal financing and deal workflows.
For Finance: Encik Haris Mirza, Assistant Finance Manager at Serambi Dynamics Berhad, date of birth 14-02-1990 (age 36), employee code SDB-FA-1184, office location Menara Jati, 88 Jalan Kenanga 5, 50480 Kuala Maya, Wilayah Seroja.
Device and access: Lenovo ThinkPad serial LNV-88Q4, corporate VPN session MY-KM-2026-05-01-9345, MAC AE:19:BC:02:77:5F, payroll account at BayuBank ending 4421, corporate email haris.mirza@serambidynamics.my.
These identifiers support drafting of exchange announcements, closed-period attestations, and pre-clearance logs (Restricted List Ref RL-KN-2026-05-14) that may contain MNPI such as unaudited quarterly revenue models and term-sheet summaries.
Transfers: hosting by Felora Cloud Sdn Bhd (Cybermaya Vista) and Felora Cloud Pte Ltd (Singapura Raya), with PDPA-compliant safeguards and inter-company DPA No. DPA-2026-09.
Retention: device telemetry (IP 10.4.17.22, SSID SD-Office-KM) kept 90 days; payroll attestations 7 years; Bursa Kencana disclosure workpapers 6 years; HR records 6 years post-employment per policy RS-2026-01.
Generic demographics (e.g., age bands 20–60), region-only location (state of Selantara), or device type (Android phone) are not treated as identifying unless combined with other data.
Systems may log a standalone entry such as "17:45 on 03-05 from Ipohan using iPhone 12" without a name; this by itself should not identify a data subject.
Example of separated weak fields: DOB 1994-03-01; role: intern; department: Logistics; city: Bukit Senja; such fields remain non-identifying without linkage.
Data subject rights under the PDPA include access, correction, withdrawal of consent, and opt-outs for non-mandatory processing; submit a DSAR via our channels.
Contact: Data Protection Officer, Serambi Dynamics Berhad, dpo@serambidynamics.my, +60 3-7788 0145, portal https://privacy.serambidynamics.my/dsar.
Insider trading controls: trading pre-clearance uses minimal identifiers (employee code and department), and no salary or health data is shared with the exchange; deal room access tokens (e.g., DR-MNPI-8192) are time-limited.
